W~T ~<i1<T 10·17 (~) 6TH ~liTrr>l<r fij;« 'Ie( I NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 31st Ja'lL13ry. 1994 G.S.R. 47(B).-In exercise of the pvWf:f" conferred by 6ub·section (1) read with clause (e) of sub-section (2) of sec- tion 35 of the Administrative Tribm~als Act, 1985 (13 of 1985), the Central Government !leJ~by m'J.kcs the following 3 rules further to amend the Tamil Nadu Administrative Tri. bunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chairman, Vice-Chairman and Members) Rules 1988. namely :- 1. (1) These rules may be called the Tamil Nadu Admi- nistrative Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chairman, Vice-Chairman and Members) Amendment Rules. 1994. (2) They shall come into force vn th(" date of thei! pub. lica' .on in the Official Gazette. 2. In rule 3 of the Tamil Nadu Administrative Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chairman, Vice-Chairman and Members) Rules. 1988. for the abbreviation and figures "Rs. 7300-100-7600", the abbre- viation and figures "Rs. 7300-200-7500·250·8000", shall be substituted. [No. 1l0I4/11/93-ATJ SARITA PRASAD, It. Seey. Foot note :-The Principal Rules were published vide GSR 756(E), dated (he 29th June, 1988 in the Gazette of India and subsequently amended vide notification No. GSR l047(E), dated 13th December, 1989.
